combined_text: Number the Stars Number the Stars APRIL 29 – MAY 22, 2016 • Ages 8+Based on the book by Lois Lowry Adapted by Dr. Douglas W. Larche with Susan Elliott Larche All the drama, pathos, adventure, terror and humor of Lois Lowry’s Newbery Award winning book come to life in our intimate Hopkins Jaycees Studio this spring.
